name: Bill McDermott
background: Bill McDermott has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since November 2019. From 2010 to 2019, Mr. McDermott served as CEO of SAP SE. He joined SAP in 2002 and held various leadership positions before becoming CEO.

companies.name: ServiceNow, Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
